conversationHistory.description: prior conversation turns filled into the # Conversation History section (defaults to 'No previous conversation.')

question.description: the current question filled into the # Current Question section

context.description: retrieved code context (markdown) filled into the # Code Context section

additionalInstructions.description: declared for the union of double-brace tokens present in the shared payload file (used by core-qa-template); not filled by the conversational builder

sample.conversationHistory:
user: what does authenticate do?
assistant: ...
sample.question: And where is the session created?

checks: response continues the conversation using prior-turn context
CodeRef citations maintained; follow-up questions suggested

provider.notes: the with-history user-turn template filled by PromptTemplateBuilder.buildConversationalPrompt(); union of prompt-templates.ts double-brace tokens declared (additionalInstructions unused here = WARN only)
